announcements.title: YouTube Watch Later Tidy v1.3.2 is live — force-update if you don't have it yet
bullets: Open a new tab and go to chrome://extensions
Top-right corner: turn on Developer mode
Top-left corner: click the "Update" button
Reload your YouTube tab — you should now be on v1.3.2

announcements.title: What's New in v1.3.2
bullets: Bug fix: the sticky toolbar (Sort / Filter / Delete) no longer floats over progress dialogs while deleting, syncing, loading unavailable videos, or moving videos between playlists
No other changes — everything from v1.3.1 still applies

announcements.title: What's New in v1.3.1
bullets: Custom duration range — filter by any min/max (in minutes), not just the preset buckets
Toolbar stays pinned while scrolling so Sort / Filter / Delete are always reachable
Sort dropdown polished — "By Playlist Order" is now its own section with a (i) hover tip explaining where to set it on YouTube
Info announcements now show as a red counter on the 🔔 bell button instead of stacking above your videos — click the bell to read them
Announcement dates are shown next to the title
Success confirmations (like bulk move) no longer wear the yellow warning style
View counts restored on video cards (YouTube changed their data shape — we adapted)
Links inside announcements are now clickable
Under the hood: every YouTube endpoint / action / response path now lives on tidywl.com, so most future YouTube API changes can be fixed without a new extension release

announcements.title: Join the TidyWL Discord 👥
announcements.message: We now have a Discord community for bug reports, feature requests, and general chat. The invite link never expires — come say hi: https://discord.gg/natc623GhX

announcements.title: What's New in v1.3.0
bullets: Filter by duration — Shorts, Under 5 min, 5–20 min, 20–60 min, Over 1 hour
Sort by duration (longest or shortest first)
Sort by published date (newest or oldest first)
Topic-breakdown auto-refresh after delete — no more stranded empty groups
Honest sort labels — "Date Added" renamed to "Playlist order" because YouTube doesn't expose per-video added-date timestamps on web

announcements.title: Testing - What's New in v1.2.0
bullets: Unavailable videos filter — find deleted, private, or region-locked videos cluttering your list
Drag-and-drop reordering, plus bulk Move to Top / Move to Bottom
Per-video action menu (open in tab, move, delete)
Open selected videos in new tabs
Brand-channel sync fix
Hidden-count tooltip explaining why YouTube's total can exceed what TidyWL fetches

announcements.title: We have a new home: tidywl.com
announcements.message: TidyWL's landing page is now live at tidywl.com — bookmark it for quick access and share it with anyone whose Watch Later is out of control.
